items.title: Don't Like to Pay Taxes? 2 Things to Do That Could Make You Richer.
items.author: Selena Maranjian
items.description: The article discusses strategies to reduce tax bills, such as holding investments long-term, contributing to tax-advantaged retirement accounts, and other tax-saving methods. It highlights the importance of being selective and ready to sell underperforming investments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that Boeing, once a respected and solid investment, has experienced various quality issues and a management shake-up in recent years, leading to a decline in earnings and stock price.

The article mentions that Boeing, once a respected and solid investment, has experienced various quality issues and a management shake-up in recent years, leading to a decline in earnings and stock price.
The article uses Netflix as an example of an 'amazing performer' that, if invested in early on in a Roth IRA, could have resulted in a substantial tax-free gain.
Similar to Netflix, the article mentions Nvidia as another example of an 'amazing performer' that, if invested in early on in a Roth IRA, could have resulted in a substantial tax-free gain.
